commands.command:

## Title: MyAddon

MyAddon.lua
commands.description: Define an AddOn in a TOC file
commands.scenario: Define an AddOn in a TOC file

commands.command:
local frame = CreateFrame('Frame')
frame:RegisterEvent('PLAYER_LOGIN')
frame:SetScript('OnEvent', function(self, event, ...)
  print('Player logged in!')
end)
commands.description: Register an event in Lua for an AddOn
commands.scenario: Register an event in Lua for an AddOn

commands.command: for i, v in ipairs(myTable) do\n  print(i, v)\nend
commands.description: Create a loop in Lua to iterate over a table
commands.scenario: Create a loop in Lua to iterate over a table

commands.command:
local status, err = pcall(function()
  error('An error occurred!')
end)
if not status then
  print('Error:', err)
end
commands.description: Handle errors in Lua with pcall
commands.scenario: Handle errors in Lua with pcall
